name: the-year-of-living-danishly
description: Helen Russell's The Year of Living Danishly — uncover the secrets of the world's happiest country and apply Danish principles to your own life
useCase: Helps users understand Danish happiness principles (hygge, trust, work-life balance, Jante's Law) and apply them to transform their own well-being, home, career, and relationships.
knownRisks: Danish cultural practices are context-dependent and may not directly translate to other countries' systems and norms
